calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-25-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Tom M. Weber, Defendent and opposing party appeared in Propria Persona
No other appearances.

HEARING HELD on Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. RULNG AFTER HEARING: The amount of $252.91 is ordered release to the judgment creditor for payment on the judgment; $758.74 in earnings is ordered returned to the judgment debtor. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED. (EAH/612)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar May-07-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant / moving party Tom M. Weber appearing in pro per (415-841-0383).

RULING:
NO other APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $100 per pay period. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
